# Behind on Rent? - Eviction Prevention Options [2026] - Behindonrent
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Behind on rent and facing eviction? Emergency assistance, negotiation, and whether bankruptcy can help. 2026 guide.

## About
behindonrent.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- How Bankruptcy Affects Rent and Eviction - Behindonrent: https://behindonrent.com/bankruptcy-and-rent.html
- Emergency Rental Assistance - Find Help in Your Area - Behindonrent: https://behindonrent.com/emergency-rental-assistance.html
- The Eviction Timeline - From Missed Rent to Lockout - Behindonrent: https://behindonrent.com/eviction-timeline.html
- Behind on Rent? - Eviction Prevention Options [2026] - Behindonrent: https://behindonrent.com/
- Free Legal Aid for Tenants Facing Eviction - Behindonrent: https://behindonrent.com/legal-aid-resources.html
- Negotiating With Your Landlord When You Are Behind on Rent - Behindonrent: https://behindonrent.com/negotiating-with-landlord.html
- Section 8 Tenant Protections - Know Your Voucher Rights - Behindonrent: https://behindonrent.com/section-8-protections.html
- Security Deposit Rights - Getting Your Money Back - Behindonrent: https://behindonrent.com/security-deposit-rights.html
- Tenant Rights by State - Eviction Protections and Notice Requirements - Behindonrent: https://behindonrent.com/tenant-rights-by-state.html
- Tenant Rights When Behind on Rent - Behindonrent: https://behindonrent.com/tenant-rights.html
- Utility Assistance Programs for Renters - Behindonrent: https://behindonrent.com/utility-assistance.html
- Privacy Policy: https://behindonrent.com/privacy.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
